programme.title: Squatters

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: When a stranger moves in and takes over the new home of Nabih and Kadeisha, Flash and his team are deployed to Dearborn, Michigan with one goal: out squat the squatter; but what starts as a straightforward job becomes a battle of endurance when the trespasser challenges Flash to see who can hold their ground the longest.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash Shelton and his team head to Vancouver, Washington to help a homeowner after a house sitter overstays her welcome and becomes an unwanted squatter; when Flash's team attempts to reclaim the home by using surveillance cameras, megaphones and even snakes, the confrontation turns into a tense standoff.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Washington, health issues forced Zachary out of his dream home; he rented it to seemingly trustworthy tenants-only to realize they were alleged serial squatters who stopped paying and refused to leave; in one of his toughest fights yet, can Flash and his team take this home back?

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash heads to Philadelphia to help Paul, who returns from a stint in Vegas to start a family with his fiancée, only to find a stranger has taken over his Pennsylvania home; when Flash confronts multiple occupants, tensions mount, culminating in a boiling standoff.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In New York, Maria turns part of her home into an apartment for her grandson-but everything unravels when a negligent tenant living under the same roof as her, refuses to vacate; after barricading the door and cutting off access to her own space, Flash and his team face the escalating battle.

programme.title: Squatters

programme.title: Squatters
